mechanics.excerpt: BUPPORT WEAPONS Usually heavy and expensive , support weapons give foot soldiers fighting chance against tanks, BattleMechs ad other heavily armored obstacles These weapons include machine guns, lasers_ particle beams and rockets They are large and capable of inflicting great damage_ Grenade Launchers The common foot soldier calls upon this weapon get out sticky situation Capable firing number of different muni: tions the grenade launcher is an anti-armor weapon demolition and portable artillery piece rolled into one Most militaries issue at least one grenade launcher per infantry squad.
